name: motorical-smtp-examples
description: Runnable examples for integrating Motorical SMTP HTTP sending, SMTP credentials, and webhooks.

scripts.check: node --check node-http-send/send-email.js && node --check node-webhooks/server.js && node --check smtp-nodemailer/send-email.js && node --check nextjs-contact-form/app/api/contact/route.js && python3 -m py_compile python-http-send/send_email.py
